title: Which Is Which
content:
"God bless the King! God bless the faith's defender!
    God bless, no harm in blessing, the Pretender.
    But who pretender is, and who is king,
    God bless us all, that's quite another thing."
meaning:
"Which Is Which" is a quintessential example of John Byrom's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
